description: Major AI data center / compute capex announcement by hyperscaler or neocloud, deal size >= $5B
source: News archives, WSJ, Bloomberg, CNBC, company PR

instances.headline: Trump, OpenAI, Oracle, SoftBank announce $500B Stargate AI infrastructure JV

AXTI.note: upstream InP substrate, slower but sustained

instances.context: First major post-election AI infrastructure deal. Broad 'AI trade' re-ignited. SPY +0.6% that day.

instances.headline: Oracle signs $300B compute contract with OpenAI, RPO jumps 359% to $455B

ORCL.note: BIGGEST one-day gain since 1992. Ellison briefly richest

LITE.note: photonics mega-rally starts here; stock went $150 -> $820 over 6 months

AXTI.note: upstream InP, lagged but eventually caught

instances.context: THE biggest single catalyst of 2025 photonics trade. SPY flat that day. Entire optical supply chain re-rated.

instances.event_name: Stargate 5 new US data center sites (7GW total)
instances.headline: OpenAI, Oracle, SoftBank announce 5 new sites bringing Stargate to 7GW/$400B
instances.context: Incremental follow-on, weaker reaction than primary event. Signal: second-wave announcements in same pattern produce smaller but real alpha.

instances.headline: AWS wins $38B OpenAI contract, announces Project Rainier $11B DC

AMZN.note: AWS re-rates as AI cloud player

instances.context: Showed pattern generalizes beyond Oracle-OpenAI axis. Amazon joining signals broader buildout.

instances.headline: Meta to build $50B Hyperion AI data center in Louisiana
instances.context: Pre-Stargate era. Pattern worked but smaller magnitude. Shows pattern was valid even before AI euphoria peaked.

instances.headline: OpenAI commits to 6GW of AMD Instinct GPUs, AMD grants 10% stake option at $0.01 warrant

LITE.note: photonics benefits regardless of GPU vendor

instances.context: Variant of pattern where target is not hyperscaler but a chip vendor. Still triggers optics/memory upstream.

aggregate_stats.spy_comparison_approx: pattern generates +5-12% alpha vs SPY T+5

key_learnings: Tier 1 (LITE, COHR, VRT) reliably reacts within 24h; easy to catch
Tier 2 upstream (AXTI, AEHR, FN) has LARGER T+30 return - better asymmetry - but needs patience
The first occurrence of a pattern in a cycle delivers biggest move (Oracle-OpenAI 9/10 was the gold event)
Follow-on announcements in same pattern (Stargate 5-sites) see diminishing returns - saturation signal
Deal size matters - $5B+ threshold is a useful floor, >$100B creates regime-changing rallies
Pattern PASSED validation: 100% win rate, meaningful alpha, cleanly identifiable trigger
verdict: PATTERN VALIDATED - include in v1 knowledge base
